metadata.title:
MINING SYNDICATE.

One Organized which VIII Hava
Capital Stock Of Two Million


Dollars.

pages.raw_text:
Articles Of incorporation were filed
today for the Cooperative Mining
Syndicate, capitalized at $4,000. 900,
divided into 1000 shares Of $1,000
each.


The officers Of the Syndicate are:
President, Judge A. G.. Kellam; vice
president. ]. B. Lindsey; secretary,
A. H. Wheatley, and treasurer. John
Mackenzie.


1t is the purpose of the syndicate
to acquire and operate mining prop
critics in the neighborhood and It will
be matter to appeal to the Spokane
investor.


The syndicate has now options
upon extensive placer claims and
work will be begun Immediately upon
them.


The officers. who. with w. H. Bray
ton, compose the board of trustees,
are all we'll known Spokane men. The
shares will be paid for In assessments
of 81 monthly.
